description: Independent LLM-powered Word, Excel, and PowerPoint route using OfficeCLI.

permissions.name: network
permissions.reason: Use the WeConnect LLM provider configured by WECHAT2ALL_LLM_* variables.

permissions.name: filesystem:read
permissions.reason: Read user-provided Office documents and assets inside the private route workspace.

permissions.name: filesystem:write
permissions.reason: Create and edit Office documents inside the private route workspace.

permissions.name: process:spawn
permissions.reason: Run the OfficeCLI binary with validated arguments and no shell.
